basic_info.title: Cannon Fodder 3
basic_info.review: Cannon Fodder 3 successfully captures the spirit of the original with improved graphics and refined mechanics, though it lacks the polish of modern RTS titles.

alternative_names: Cannon Fodder 3: The War Goes On

previous_game.title: Cannon Fodder 2: Once More unto the Breach

play_today.details: The only officially supported modern version available. Includes Steam Cloud saves and community support.

Third ranking slot filled by the same Windows platform due to the absence of other versions. The game is a tactical action title that inherited the series' traditions. While critics noted shallow gameplay and tedious extended sessions, the PC version remains the most convenient way to experience the title today with modern OS compatibility.

recommended_patches.name: Engine.ini VSync and Multisampling Fix
recommended_patches.description: Manually edits the engine configuration file to enable vertical sync and multisampling, resolving severe graphical tearing and reducing load times from minutes to seconds on modern displays.

recommended_patches.name: Flawless Widescreen Fix
recommended_patches.description: A community-maintained patch that enables native widescreen and ultrawide resolutions, fixing aspect ratio issues and stretching that occur in the default Steam version.

recommended_patches.name: Open Fodder
recommended_patches.description: An open-source engine port that allows Cannon Fodder and Cannon Fodder 2 to run natively on modern Windows systems with native widescreen support, high-resolution rendering, and bug fixes for modern hardware compatibility.

recommended_patches.name: Cannon Fodder Password SRAM Patch
recommended_patches.description: A utility patch that enables password saving functionality and SRAM support for the original DOS/Windows version, allowing players to save progress without external tools.

recommended_patches.name: OpenFodder Engine Port
recommended_patches.description: An open-source reimplementation of the Cannon Fodder engine that enables native widescreen support, high-resolution rendering, and modern OS compatibility for the original DOS titles.

recommended_patches.name: Widescreen Fixes Pack (Generic)
recommended_patches.description: A community-maintained collection of DLLs and scripts to force widescreen aspect ratios and fix resolution issues in older PC games that lack native support.

recommended_patches.name: Cannon Fodder 3 Steam Community Fix
recommended_patches.description: A manual configuration fix involving engine.ini edits to resolve load time freezes and VSync issues specific to the Steam release of Cannon Fodder 3.

play_today.details: Provides the same game content as the Windows version but with Mac-specific optimizations. Features the full tactical campaign and English localization. However, it lacks the extensive modding community and third-party tool support available on Windows, and performance can vary on newer Mac hardware.

recommended_patches.name: Open Fodder
recommended_patches.description: An open-source engine port that allows Cannon Fodder and Cannon Fodder 2 to run natively on macOS with native widescreen support, high-resolution rendering, and bug fixes for modern Apple Silicon and Intel hardware.

recommended_patches.name: OpenFodder macOS Build
recommended_patches.description: The macOS-compatible build of the OpenFodder engine, allowing native execution of Cannon Fodder 1 and 2 with modern display scaling and controller support.

description.synopsis: Cannon Fodder 3 follows the chaotic adventures of conscripted soldiers in a satirical war setting. Players command squads of troops through intense tactical battles, managing resources and executing strategic maneuvers to achieve mission objectives. The game blends humor with challenging gameplay, staying true to the legacy of the original series.
key_features: Squad-based command mechanics with up to 6 soldiers
Cooperative multiplayer mode for up to 4 players
Extensive single-player campaign with 500 conscript units
Classic top-down perspective with modern graphics
Strategic resource allocation and unit positioning
Challenging mission objectives requiring precise timing
legacy_and_impact: Cannon Fodder 3 revitalized a classic franchise for a new generation, bridging the gap between retro strategy games and modern expectations. Its satirical take on war and squad-based tactics continues to resonate with fans of the genre.
